newsArray.title: De Beers Group partners with Abhishek Sharma to promote natural diamonds in India
newsArray.description: De Beers Group, the diamond company, announced its association with Indian cricketer Abhishek Sharma as part of its efforts to promote natural diamonds in India. Sharma, who has gained attention in Indian cricket for his aggressive style of play, has been positioned by the brand as representing qualities such as authenticity and individuality, which it seeks to associate with natural diamonds. The cricketer has built a following among younger audiences and is seen by the brand as reflecting themes of resilience and self-belief, which it aims to highlight through this association. Beyond the field, Sharma is also known for his personal style and has been seen wearing natural diamonds. According to the brand, the association aims to highlight diamonds not only as celebratory purchases but also as a form of personal expression. Speaking on the association, Abhishek Sharma said, “I'm looking forward to partnering with De Beers as they share my passion for the timeless elegance of natural diamonds. I've always been drawn to diamonds for their understated sophistication and the unique story each one tells. This collaboration feels like a natural fit, and I’m excited to create something special together while celebrating the meaning and legacy of natural diamonds.” Commenting on the announcement, Toranj Mehta , Vice President, Marketing, De Beers India, said, “Abhishek embodies the character of natural diamonds through his confidence, authenticity, and clarity of self. He does not just wear diamonds. He reflects what they stand for: rarity, resilience, and inner fire. At De Beers Group, we focus on the emotional meaning diamonds hold, and Abhishek’s choice to wear them during important moments of his career makes this a powerful and contemporary narrative. We are thrilled to celebrate this moment for Indian cricket with him.”
creator: social samosa
